sessions.description: Description: Warm-Up 300m Easy, RPE4 8x25m Fists drills w/ 10s rest between drills 4x300m Moderate-Hard, RPE7 w/ 60s rest between intervals 4x50m Fastest Average, RPE9 w/ 20s rest between sprints 8x25m Kicking drills w/ 15s rest between drills Cool-Down 300m Easy, RPE4  Drill Instructions Fists (F) - Swim with clenched fists and focus on rotating your shoulders and bending your working elbow during the catch, creating a pull that's nearly as powerful as one done with an open hand.  Fastest Average (FA) - Swim each repetition at a pace that is as fast as you can sustain for the entire set, while still being able to complete all the repetitions at the given RPE. Aim to maintain a consistent time for each repetition throughout the set. For example: If doing 4 x 100m freestyle, it would be better to swim 1:20, 1:21, 1:19, 1:20 (with an average pace of 1:20 per 100m) than to swim 1:18, 1:18, 1:20, 1:28 (averaging 1:21 per 100m).  Kicking (K) - Swim facedown using only your feet to propel you as you breathe just as you would during a freestyle stroke by rolling to the side and turning your head to catch some air. Focus on "pushing" your chest down while keeping your legs & hips up toward the surface as you practice balance & kicking technique.

TSS 60, IF 0.71, kJ(Cal) 560.  Description: 8min easy spin 3min LT1 60 sec easy 5 x30 sec V02- 30 easy extra 2min easy  Main set - Aerobic Progression 5x8min building from Aerobic to just above LT1 (tempo) all with 1 min recovery  8min easy cd
